header.name: description
header.formHint: A short description of what this skill does.

header.name: license
header.formHint: The license under which this skill is released, e.g., "MIT" or "GPL-3.0".

header.name: allowed-tools
header.formHint: The tools allowed to be used on this skill. If not set, all enabled tools are allowed.

header.name: compatibility
header.formHint: Prerequisites for this skill to work, e.g., "requires dotnet framework 4.5" or "requires access to the project management tool".

header.name: metadata
header.formHint: Add any information you want on the template that can be valid for the user, e.g., "author" or "version".

body.name: instructions
body.formHint: The instructions for the skill. This section can be used on the skill template to provide detailed guidance and context for the skill.
